stories.title: Is Mike Trout back? Who is the best hitter in base...
stories.summary: What stands out as the calendar turns to May? Let's break down the biggest early trends.

stories.title: Copy of MLB Power Rankings: How far have these NL powerhou...
stories.summary: A number of preseason playoff favorites are still struggling, while a couple of unexpected contenders continue their rise up our list.

stories.title: Source: Vet DE Campbell reuniting with Ravens
stories.summary: Veteran defensive end Calais Campbell, who played with the Ravens from 2020 to 2022, is returning to sign a one-year deal with Baltimore, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

stories.title: Wall becomes Howard's prez of basketball ops
stories.summary: Five-time NBA All-Star John Wall has become the president of basketball operations at Howard University, returning to Washington to partner with the top-ranked HBCU in the country, school officials told ESPN.

stories.title: 3-time Lady Byng winner Kopitar among finalists
stories.summary: Montreal's Cole Caufield, Los Angeles' Anze Kopitar and Ottawa's Jake Sanderson are the finalists for the Lady Byng Memorial Trophy, the NHL award for best sportsmanship.
